headline: Exxon Mobil’s Guyana Automation Milestone And What It Means For Investors
summary: Exxon Mobil (NYSE:XOM) has enabled the first fully automated geological well placement in offshore Guyana through its partnership with Halliburton. The project, part of the FutureWell initiative, uses digital and automation technologies to run rig operations with minimal manual intervention. This milestone sets a new performance benchmark for offshore drilling in Guyana and for wider industry adoption of digitally integrated operations. For investors following NYSE:XOM, this news sits...

headline: ExxonMobil and Halliburton Achieve World’s First Fully Closed-Loop Automated Geological Well Placement in Guyana
summary: HOUSTON, March 16, 2026--Halliburton (NYSE: HAL), in collaboration with ExxonMobil, Sekal, Noble, and the Wells Alliance Guyana team, delivered a groundbreaking step forward in digital well construction to achieve the industry’s first fully automated geological well placement with complete rig automation in offshore Guyana. The project combined rig automation, automated subsurface interpretation and well placement, and real-time hydraulics to establish a new benchmark for well construction perfo

headline: Why traders are getting nervous about Iran's $200 oil warning as the conflict drags on
summary: Analysts told CNBC that the prospect of oil prices soaring to $200 per barrel shouldn’t be ruled out as the Iran war drags on.
